subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for the kind words about our team’s work. We’d be happy to explore a short introductory call.

A few slots that work on our side are:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

If one of those windows suits you, please send over your preferred time and I’ll confirm it.

I can’t share internal contact directories or direct phone numbers for staff, but our public website has the best general contact information and overview of the team.

Best,
Assistant
